description_long: This object is a filled pastry resembling a Sicilian cannoli, featuring a golden-brown, tubular shell with a bubbly, crisp texture. Both ends are dipped in dark chocolate and coated with finely chopped pistachios, while the center is dusted with powdered sugar. The filling appears creamy and light brown, likely a sweet ricotta or mascarpone mixture, visible at both ends. The shell has a slightly rough, fried appearance, and the chocolate coating adds a glossy contrast to the matte pastry. The overall look is appetizing and artisanal, with visible toppings and a rich, multi-textured surface.
description: A golden-brown, tubular pastry with chocolate-dipped ends, pistachio pieces, and powdered sugar, filled with a creamy center.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pastry, with chocolate-dipped ends, pistachio pieces, and powdered sugar on top.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the pistachio-coated, chocolate-dipped tip and the creamy filling inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the bubbly shell, chocolate, and powdered sugar.
description_view_3: Other end-on view, focusing on the pistachio and chocolate coating and the creamy filling.
attribute_pastry_type: Sicilian cannoli with chocolate and pistachio
